references.role: global kitchen identity on every Seedance segment
references.prompt: Preserve Licorn island materials, cabinetry colour, countertop lighting continuity across macro and wider shots.

references.role: overhead countertop choreography for parmesan rain, forming, breading, and risotto folds
references.prompt: Lock consistent shadow direction and island edge radius when camera is top-down.

references.role: breathing context for closing satisfaction beat
references.prompt: Use sparingly to re-anchor environment after long macro run.

references.role: tight induction framing for butter foam, wine hiss, and oil shimmer fry physics
references.prompt: Never show open flame; keep glass-ceramic read correct.

references.role: deep saucepan silhouette for risotto and fry pot
references.prompt: Maintain rim height plausible for submerged arancini fry.

references.role: folding rice, scraping pan, gentle fry rotation
references.prompt: Flexible blade profile for starch release shots without exaggerated flex.
Hands stay on-brand with skin tones and cuff details from sheet reference.

references.role: hands for overhead risotto and panure beats
references.prompt: Align wrist angle with Licorn physique when interacting with cookware.

references.role: side-dominant hands for shaping and tearing arancini
references.prompt: Keep shoulders relaxed, focus on tactile finger moves.
Chef faces camera with subtle smile, no exaggerated gesture.

references.role: cooled creamy risotto mass with peas parsley and parmesan ribbons still showing individual grains
references.prompt: Generate Licorn-style overhead macro of arborio risotto fold: satin cream binding visible grains, scattered bright peas, parsley flecks, pale parmesan veins, subtle steam only if still warm, not soup, not puree.

references.role: 6 cm sphere sealed with mozzarella hidden, surface slightly tacky before dredge
references.prompt: Generate single pale rice ball showing flecks of peas and herbs, seamless seam, mozzarella not visible externally, matte-sticky finish consistent with chilled risotto.

references.role: pre-fry double breadcrumb coat with fine grit and slight peaks, still blonde
references.prompt: Generate arancini coated twice: dense micro-crumb texture, pale gold only from egg, no fry blisters yet, spherical 6 cm.

references.role: post-fry shell target for even gold crisp micro pores
references.prompt: Generate single fried arancini with uniform golden crumb, faint oil sheen, no burns, hints of herbs through crust, spherical integrity.

references.role: hero cross-section with stretch mozzarella steam and rice matrix
references.prompt: Generate torn arancini cross-section: crisp shell edge, creamy rice, whole green peas, herb flecks, molten mozzarella forming elastic stretch filaments with light steam wisps.

references.role: stacked presentation in earthy ceramic echoing cookbook photo
references.prompt: Generate shallow rustic brown ceramic bowl piled with golden arancini, simple metal spoon, warm side light, subtle salad leaves peripheral, Licorn kitchen colour harmony.
